title: Zomato Restaurant Scraper Input
description: Collect public restaurant listing data from Zomato by city and search keywords.

city.title: City
city.description: Zomato city to search, for example Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bengaluru, Pune, Hyderabad, or Chennai.

searchQueries.title: Search keywords
searchQueries.description: Restaurant or cuisine keywords. Use restaurants for the general city listing.

categories.title: Cuisine / text filters
categories.description: Optional filters such as biryani, pizza, cafe, chinese, or dessert. Matching is case-insensitive.

minRating.title: Minimum rating
minRating.description: Only save restaurants at or above this rating when rating is available.

maxResults.title: Maximum restaurants
maxResults.description: Maximum unique restaurant records to save across all keywords.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential India proxies are recommended for reliable regional access.
